decisions.title: Enable Python Execution in Production
decisions.context: Python Rules is a core 2026 pillar product. Staging enablement (ENG-10601) is complete. Need production rollout decision to capture customer decisions via programmable rules.

arguments.for: Unlocks Python Rules GA, directly supports 'Nail the Core' pillar, enables decision capture at scale
arguments.against: Need additional load testing, cache warmup RAM spike (ENG-10595) still under investigation

decisions.title: Sunset Read-next Feature
decisions.context: ENG-10593 removes Read-next functionality. Need to confirm no customer dependencies and communication plan before final removal.

arguments.for: Reduces technical debt, allows team focus on core decision-capture workflows
arguments.against: May impact workflows for legacy customers not yet migrated to Canvas

decisions.title: Standardize Calculated Channel Versioning UX
decisions.context: Multiple issues (ENG-9807, ENG-10357, ENG-8512) show stale data confusion. Need decision on surfacing version info consistently across Explore V2.

arguments.for: Prevents wrong decisions from stale data, improves 'Embed Deeper' trust
arguments.against: Adds visual complexity to already dense interface

decisions.title: Keysight Technologies Engagement Strategy
decisions.context: CAGR-21 pre-meeting brief ready. Large enterprise prospect. Need POV on custom integration vs. standard deployment for decision capture.

arguments.for: High-value account, could validate 'Build the Moat' via enterprise integration patterns
arguments.against: Custom work may distract from core product development roadmap

decisions.title: Sift Edge Transaction Metrics Rollout
decisions.context: ENG-10403 adds database transaction metrics. Need decision on monitoring thresholds and alerting before wider Edge deployment.
decisions.blockedBy: Load balancer timeout behavior testing (ENG-10576) incomplete

arguments.for: Critical for Sift Edge reliability, supports 'Embed Deeper' at the edge
arguments.against: Premature rollout could create alert fatigue without proper baselines

timeAudit.weekSummary: Heavy meeting load. Critical: Keysight pre-meeting 4/24, Python staging review 4/22, Edge metrics sync 4/23. Need 4hr focus block for Canvas disposition strategy.
alerts: Only 2 focus blocks scheduled this week - below 4-block minimum for execution velocity
3 one-on-ones clustered Monday - consider spreading across week
Keysight meeting prep needs 2hr block before 4/24 deadline
